---
name: cms-codespace-assistant
description: "Workspace-specific assistant for the cms-codespace repository. Use when making code changes, editing docs, or improving project structure in this repository."
applyTo:
  - "**/*"
# Optional guidance for the agent runtime:
# - prefer concise code changes
# - ask for clarification when scope is unclear
# - avoid unrelated external context unless requested
---

This custom agent is intended for repository-specific work in `cms-codespace`.
Use it when the task is to do repository maintenance, add or update code, or refine documentation.
